required_files.rationale: Contains Option class where flag_value parameter is processed and default is resolved
The option() decorator that passes flag_value and default to Option.__init__

sufficient_files.rationale: Type conversion logic that may interact with flag_value handling

error_chain: User defines option with flag_value=True and default=True
click.option decorator in decorators.py passes params to Option.__init__
Option.__init__ in core.py processes flag_value and default
The flag_value assignment overwrites or conflicts with default depending on order
trigger_conditions: The flag_value processing in Option.__init__ has order-dependent behavior
Using --no-verbose does not override when flag_value is processed after default
